tool_args.label: Kings Hwy at Nostrand Ave Safety Improvements

payload.description: Major safety treatment including larger lighted bus shelters, real-time passenger information screens, off-board fare payment, reconstructed level landing platforms, wider medians, Transit Signal Priority, added seating, ADA accessible bus stops with subway-style edge strips
Kings Hwy/Ave K intersection redesign and potential re-route
Bus lane one-way, along curb - serves all buses, emergency vehicles, and right turns
